mapper.insert: insert into version( id, name, region, generation ) values( #{id}, #{name}, #{region}, #{generation} )
INSERT INTO type( id, name, generation, sprite ) VALUES( #{id}, #{name}, #{generation}, #{sprite} )
INSERT INTO type_efficacy( damage_type_id, target_type_id, damage_factor ) VALUES( #{damageTypeId}, #{targetTypeId}, #{damageFactor} )
INSERT INTO egg_group( id, name ) VALUES( #{id}, #{name} )
